reviews.review_description:
So much to customize! Emphasize elbow strikes, punches, dodging balls or walls in whatever proportion or amounts you want.  Can play up to 10 rounds with up to 10 minutes per round so plenty of exercise time at 100 minutes straight. Also like how the game speeds up and/or slows down depending on your stamina.

Great buy at this price!

First, thank you developers for this great VR workout exercises, I really enjoyed it very much.
Can you add the pass through options and functions into this exercises if possible,  the floor pass through is the most useful and helpful function to have for this type of workout exercise.  Please. Thank you.
Yes, I do recommend this great VR workout game for everyone to enjoy.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing our application. We are also very happy to receive such comments and high ratings. Your opinion that this kind of app is suitable for AR,XR is exactly right. However, I am sorry, but please wait until Quest3 is released to update it. Please continue to enjoy our app. Thank you very much.

7/6 Update: We have tentatively added the requested pass-through display feature. If there are any issues, please let us know. Thank you.
